mapper.select:
WITH TEMP AS ( SELECT concat(b.ntnl_pnt_no,'-',C.cm_nm) AS alarm_text1 ,concat(TO_CHAR(b.date_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'),' ',c.cm_nm,' ', CASE WHEN b.event_cd IN ('01') THEN concat(gps_lon,'-',gps_lat) WHEN B.event_cd IN ('02','03') THEN TEMP::TEXT WHEN B.event_cd IN ('04','05') THEN hum::text WHEN B.event_cd IN ('06','07','08') THEN slope WHEN B.event_cd IN ('09') THEN SHOCK::text WHEN B.event_cd IN ('10') THEN SOUND::text WHEN B.event_cd IN ('11') THEN battery1::text WHEN B.event_cd IN ('12') THEN battery2::text WHEN B.event_cd IN ('13') THEN battery3::TEXT END,c.refval03) AS alarm_text2 ,A.chk_flag ,a.snsr_alrm_seq ,CASE WHEN A.chk_flag = '1' THEN '' ELSE 'read new' END AS read_cls ,CASE WHEN b.event_cd IN ('01') THEN 'icon type-gps' WHEN B.event_cd IN ('02','03','04','05') THEN 'icon type-humidity' WHEN B.event_cd IN ('06','07','08') THEN 'icon type-protractor' WHEN B.event_cd IN ('09') THEN 'icon type-shock' WHEN B.event_cd IN ('10') THEN 'icon type-sound' WHEN B.event_cd IN ('11','12','13') THEN 'icon type-battery' END icon_cls ,CASE WHEN b.event_cd IN ('01') THEN 'IconGps' WHEN B.event_cd IN ('02','03','04','05') THEN 'IconHumidity' WHEN B.event_cd IN ('06','07','08') THEN 'IconProtractor' WHEN B.event_cd IN ('09') THEN 'IconShock' WHEN B.event_cd IN ('10') THEN 'IconSound' WHEN B.event_cd IN ('11','12','13') THEN 'IconBattery' END icon_img ,b.date_time FROM tb_snsr_alrm a INNER JOIN tb_snsr_data b ON a.snsr_data_seq = b.snsr_data_seq INNER JOIN TB_COM_CD C ON B.event_cd = C.CM_CD AND REFVAL11 = '1' AND COM_GRP_CD_sEQ = '6' WHERE a.user_seq = #{userSeq} ) SELECT alarm_text1 ,alarm_text2 ,snsr_alrm_seq ,read_cls ,icon_cls ,icon_img ,chk_flag ,date_time FROM TEMP WHERE chk_flag = false
UNION ALL SELECT alarm_text1 ,alarm_text2 ,snsr_alrm_seq ,read_cls ,icon_cls ,icon_img ,chk_flag ,date_time FROM TEMP WHERE chk_flag = true
order BY chk_flag, date_time desc
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_snsr_alrm SET chk_flag = TRUE ,upt_date_time = now() WHERE snsr_alrm_seq = #{snsrAlrmSeq}
UPDATE tb_snsr_alrm SET chk_flag = TRUE ,upt_date_time = now() WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq}
